content.json:
# MACH — Composability & Reliability

End-to-end view across the seven Function hosts and the four vendors. Telemetry is OpenTelemetry exported to Application Insights (see `Mach.ServiceDefaults`). Set `OTEL_SERVICE_NAME` per host to split `cloud_RoleName`.

content.query:
dependencies
| where type in ("HTTP", "Http")
| summarize calls = count(), p50 = percentile(duration, 50), p95 = percentile(duration, 95), p99 = percentile(duration, 99), failures = countif(success == false) by target
| extend failureRatePct = round(100.0 * failures / calls, 2)
| order by p95 desc

content.json: ## Dependency failure rate over time (by vendor)

content.query:
dependencies
| where type in ("HTTP", "Http")
| summarize total = count(), failures = countif(success == false) by bin(timestamp, 5m), target
| extend failureRatePct = round(100.0 * failures / total, 2)
| project timestamp, target, failureRatePct

content.json: ## Webhook ingress latency & success (Adyen / commercetools / Contentstack)

content.query:
requests
| where url has "/hooks/" or name has "hooks"
| extend hook = extract(@"/hooks/([a-z]+)", 1, url)
| summarize count(), p50 = percentile(duration, 50), p95 = percentile(duration, 95), success_rate = round(100.0 * countif(success) / count(), 2) by hook = coalesce(hook, name)
| order by p95 desc

content.json: ## Async hops — Service Bus publish/consume (payments / notifications / catalog / content)

content.query:
dependencies
| where type has "Queue" or type has "ServiceBus" or target has "servicebus" or name has_any ("payments","notifications","catalog","content")
| summarize messages = count(), p95 = percentile(duration, 95), failures = countif(success == false) by name, target, cloud_RoleName
| order by messages desc

content.json: ## BFF request volume & p95 latency by route

content.query:
requests
| summarize count(), p50 = percentile(duration, 50), p95 = percentile(duration, 95), errorRatePct = round(100.0 * countif(success == false) / count(), 2) by operation_Name
| order by count_ desc
| take 25
